title: Shinji and Rei in Q 30
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Shinji & Rei in Q/3.0             Quote Post by QTCHR » Sat Dec 05, 2009 10:15 pm will Shinji be a hypocrite to and turn away from Rei in the third rebuild? that would suck big time (i mean he seems less of a jerk this time around..). In the series of rebuild Asuka still has feelings for Shinji, but the emphasis clearly lies with Rei. in addition to that, how is Shinji mentally breaking down? In the second rebuild things seem to be honky donkey expect between father and son. i see no reasons for Shinji to go through the course of actions as in the two film that wrapped the original series...which also leads to the fear of Rei. then again Rei has not died but the discorvery (if it will take place) would it still give Shinji second thoughts.. that would make him a jerk..

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Dec 06, 2009 1:50 am It's already been stated that Rebuild is going to follow a different plot and have a different, new ending from the original series. It's possible Shinji may not betray Rei at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 06, 2009 2:06 am First things first, please the , it's hard to read your post. Anyway, I never noticed anything of Shinji betraying Rei in NGE other then understandable fear of her. If you mean will Rei/Shinji become a couple, it's hard to say though I personally doubt it. Themetically-speaking with Rei still being from Yui and Lilith it'd make no sense.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Dec 06, 2009 4:00 am That is a question that could only be answered by Anno at this point, and if he is still his old self, he will probably go through a lot of different scenarios before churning out the finalized script. For drama requirements, both angles could work: Shinji standing by Rei or running away from her both could be molded into a powerful narrative element. IMO, a more intersting question would be how would this new, more emotional Rei react to a revelation about her origins? She knows that she is a clone, but i don't think she knows who she is a clone of. And as for Shinji not being traumatized enough: what do you think the rest of the movies are for?

[]:             Quote Post by Napul » Sun Dec 06, 2009 8:34 am For attention from preview is: plus the fact that Shinji is not appeared in preview. What could that mean? Possibly: Shinji is not physically appear in 3.0? (viz: "You'll lose your humanity!") One body with Rei? ....... Maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Dec 06, 2009 8:55 am ukulelembo wrote: One body with Rei? .......

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Dec 06, 2009 8:56 am personally, all bets are off just about anything can happen in the final Rebuild entries

[]:             Quote Post by Napul » Sun Dec 06, 2009 10:15 am GasmaskAvenger wrote: just about anything can happen in the final Rebuild entries

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 06, 2009 11:50 am Dear god. Rei turning into some genki blushing schoolgirl like RiAO (ala 26) because she loves Shinji is the last thing Rebuild needs. She's subtle with feelings (and her actions--such as wanting both Ikaris to get along--speak louder than words), not exteremly emotional. Okay, now I sound like Logan but still.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 06, 2009 12:50 pm SaltyJoe wrote: ukulelembo wrote: One body with Rei? .......

[]:             Quote Post by firegirl26 » Sun Dec 06, 2009 1:22 pm wait if Rei is a clone of yui. wouldn't that make make Rei Shinji's sister/mother. i would find it weird that Shinji dating his sister/mother

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Dec 06, 2009 1:35 pm ^- That whole issue has been discussed to death many times.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Dec 06, 2009 1:41 pm Shinji has a huge Oedipus Complex, if you haven't noticed. Shinji and Rei isn't anything new, they already had romantic tension in the first series. Just not as much.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Sun Dec 06, 2009 1:55 pm Didn't Rei turn into a core and become one with Eva-01?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Dec 06, 2009 2:06 pm Rei and Shinji you mean? They were together and I think they went into one of the cores. I don't remember the whole scene, I'd have to re-watch the ending to be sure.

[]:             Quote Post by QTCHR » Sun Dec 06, 2009 2:29 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: First things first, please the , it's hard to read your post. Anyway, I never noticed anything of Shinji betraying Rei in NGE other then understandable fear of her. If you mean will Rei/Shinji become a couple, it's hard to say though I personally doubt it. Themetically-speaking with Rei still being from Yui and Lilith it'd make no sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Napul » Sun Dec 06, 2009 2:47 pm firegirl26 wrote: wait if Rei is a clone of yui. wouldn't that make make Rei Shinji's sister/mother. i would find it weird that Shinji dating his sister/mother

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:12 pm ukulelembo wrote: firegirl26 wrote: wait if Rei is a clone of yui. wouldn't that make make Rei Shinji's sister/mother. i would find it weird that Shinji dating his sister/mother

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:18 pm If anything, Rebuild makes the incest angle much more obvious than it was in the series. This doesn't mean they don't have romantic feelings for each other, but don't expect Oedipus and Jocasta to walk off into the sunset together. This arc pretty much has to end tragically.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Dec 06, 2009 5:12 pm Rei is not Shinji's mother. Theory of Yui's clone is only a theory.
summary: []: [Spoilers] Shinji & Rei in Q/3.0             Quote Post by QTCHR » Sat Dec 05, 2009 10:15 pm will Shinji be a hypocrite to and turn away from Rei in the third rebuild? that would suck big time (i mean he seems less of a jerk this time around..).
